title: Sewer Department to Complete Repair Work on S Clinton St on Feb 18
summary: Syracuse Sewer Department will complete repair work on South Clinton Street (between West Fayette and Walton Streets) on Sunday, February 18, 2024, starting at 7 am. The road will be closed to vehicle traffic during repairs, with sidewalks remaining open and traffic detours in place. Residents can contact Cityline for questions.
processing_notes: No budget, contract value, or financial data provided
Road closure appears to be one-time scheduled maintenance, not emergency
Contact information provided via Cityline and SYRCityline app demonstrates service delivery infrastructure
No specific timeline for completion beyond start date; duration unknown
